info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

This module contains APIs to execute commands on devices. All API for this module are under the prefix /dvm/cmd/.

For APIs to read and modify device manager database, refer to Device Manager Database module.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/add/dev-list
tags.description: Add multiple devices to the Device Manager database.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/add/device
tags.description: Add a device to the Device Manager database.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/change-ha-seq
tags.description: Modify HA sequence to promote a slave to become the primary (master) device of the cluster.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/discover/device
tags.description: Probe a remote device and retrieve its device information and system status.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/import/dev-list
tags.description: Import a list of ADOMs and devices.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/update/dev-list
tags.description: Refresh FGFM connection and system information for a list of devices.

tags.name: /dvm/cmd/update/device
tags.description: Refresh the FGFM connection and system information of a device.

add-dev-list.description: A list of device objects to be added. Refer to device action attribute to select different type of add operation.

adom.description: Name or ID of the ADOM where the command is to be executed on.

flags.description:
create_task - Create a new task in task manager database.
nonblocking - The API will return immediately in for non-blocking call. This flag will be set automatically when the adding, importing, updating, and deleting a list of devices.

authorization template.description: add model device only. Fabric Authorization Template to auto genreate for the new model device upon creation.

device action.description:
Specify add device operations, or leave blank to add real device:
  • "add_model" - add a model device.
  • "promote_unreg" - promote an unregistered device to be managed by FortiManager using information from database.

device blueprint.description: add model device only. Device blueprint to apply to the new model device.

ip.description: add real device only. Add device will probe with this IP using the log in credential specified.

name.description: required for all operations. Unique name for the device.

platform_str.description: add model device only. Required for determine the platform for VM platforms.

sn.description: add model device only. This attribute will be used to determine the device platform, except for VM platforms, where platform_str is also required.

adom.description: Name or ID of the ADOM where the command is to be executed on.

flags.description:
create_task - Create a new task in task manager database.
nonblocking - The API will return immediately in for non-blocking call. This flag will be set automatically when the adding, importing, updating, and deleting a list of devices.
log_dev - Add as logging-only device in fabric adom (Internal use only).

authorization template.description: add model device only. Fabric Authorization Template to auto genreate for the new model device upon creation.

device action.description:
Specify add device operations, or leave blank to add real device:
  • "add_model" - add a model device.
  • "promote_unreg" - promote an unregistered device to be managed by FortiManager using information from database.

platform_str.description: add model device only. Required for determine the platform for VM platforms.

sn.description: add model device only. This attribute will be used to determine the device platform, except for VM platforms, where platform_str is also required.

adom.description: Name or ID of the ADOM where the command is to be executed on.

device.description: Name or ID of the target HA cluster (original primary device).

import-adoms.description: A list of ADOM and device group objects to be imported.

import-devices.description: A list of device objects to be imported.

import-group-members.description: Associations between devices and device groups.

adom.description: Target ADOM to associate device VDOM with.
ADOM where the device group is located. Default is "root" if not specified.

grp.description: Target device group to associate device VDOM with.

mode.description:
ems - (Value no longer used as of 4.3)
provider - Global database.

foslic_inst_time.description: VM Meter first deployment time (in UNIX timestamp).

foslic_last_sync.description: VM Meter last synchronized time (in UNIX timestamp).

foslic_ram.description: VM Meter device RAM size (in MB).

foslic_utm.description:
VM Meter services
fw - Firewall
av - Anti-virus
ips - IPS
app - App control
url - Web filter
utm - Full UTM
fwb - FortiWeb

pid.description: When "nonblocking" flag is set, return the process ID for the command.

taskid.description: When "create_task" flag is set, return the ID of the task associated with the command.
